A.label: Official Primary Sources
A.description: Legislation text (Regulations, Directives), EDPB Guidelines/Opinions/Recommendations, CJEU judgments (binding interpretation)

B.label: Verified Secondary Sources
B.description: DPA enforcement decisions, national court rulings, legislative proposals

C.label: Single Source / Reference
C.description: Law firm analyses, academic papers, individual expert commentary, conference proceedings

D.label: Excluded
D.description: General news, AI-generated summaries, wikis, social media
D.note: Not included in RAG. Reference only.
